    • setNames2Vars

    • initialize

      public void initialize(ServiceConfiguration cfg)
      Called by the service configuration indicating that all services are known. Services may now start communicating or linking among their configuration partners. The service configuration can be memorized if it has not been passed in by a constructor already.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface Service
      Overrides:
      initialize in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      cfg - the service configuration this services has been assigned to.

    • isWidening

      public boolean isWidening(PrimitiveType from, PrimitiveType to)
      Description copied from interface: ProgramModelInfo
      Checks if the first given primitive type is widening to the second one. The rules are defined in the Java language specification; in short, a "smaller" type is widening to a "bigger" one.
      Specified by:
      isWidening in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Overrides:
      isWidening in class DefaultProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      from - a primitive type that might be widening into another type.
      to - a primitive type that is the destination of a widening operation.
      Returns:
      true if the first type widens into the second one, false otherwise.

    • getBoxedType

      public ClassType getBoxedType(PrimitiveType unboxedType)
      Description copied from class: DefaultProgramModelInfo
      returns the ClassType this primitive type can be boxed to, as specified in Java Language Specification, 3rd edition, 5.1.8
      Specified by:
      getBoxedType in interface ProgramModelInfo
      Overrides:
      getBoxedType in class DefaultProgramModelInfo
      Parameters:
      unboxedType - the unboxed, primitive type
      Returns:
      the ClassType this primitive type can be boxed to

    • getContainingClassType

      public ClassType getContainingClassType(ProgramElement context)
      Returns the class type that contains the given program element.
      Specified by:
      getContainingClassType in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      getContainingClassType in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      context - a program element.
      Returns:
      the type to which the given program element belongs (may be null).

    • modelChanged

      public void modelChanged(ChangeHistoryEvent event)
      Description copied from class: DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo
      Change notification callback method.
      Specified by:
      modelChanged in interface ChangeHistoryListener
      Overrides:
      modelChanged in class DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      event - an event containing the changes.

    • getVariable

      public Variable getVariable(String name, ProgramElement context)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Tries to find a variable with the given name using the given program element as context. The variable may be a local variable, a parameter or a field. Useful to check for name clashes when introducing a new identifier.
      Specified by:
      getVariable in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      getVariable in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the variable to be looked up.
      context - a program element defining the lookup context.
      Returns:
      the corresponding variable (may be null).

    • getType

      public Type getType(String name, ProgramElement context)
      Tries to find a type with the given name using the given program element as context. Useful to check for name clashes when introducing a new identifier. Neither name nor context may be null. This method is identical to DefaultSourceInfo.getType(String, ProgramElement) but it uses pe = redirectScopeNesting(pe); instead of s.getASTParent(); in Recoder 0.84.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      getType in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      name - the name for the type to be looked up; may or may not be qualified.
      context - a program element defining the lookup context (scope).
      Returns:
      the corresponding type (may be null).

    • setIgnoreUnresolvedClasses

      public void setIgnoreUnresolvedClasses(boolean ignoreUnresolvedClasses)
      Sets if unresolved classes result in an exception or lead to stubs. If unresolved classes are ignored, we use registerUnresolvedTypeRef(TypeReference) to create dummy stubs.
      Parameters:
      ignoreUnresolvedClasses - ignore unresolved classes iff true

    • getType

      public Type getType(TypeReference tr)
      Description copied from interface: SourceInfo
      Returns the referred type.
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      getType in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      tr - a type reference.
      Returns:
      the referred type (may be null).

    • getCreatedStubClasses

      public Collection<? extends CompilationUnit> getCreatedStubClasses()
      Gets the collection of created stub classes ion their compilation units
      Returns:
      the unmodifiable collection of created compilation units

    • getType

      public Type getType(Expression expr)
      clears the cache for the TypeReference to Type resolution. This is necessary if types are added after model evalutation. public void clearTypeRefCache() { shit: reference2element.clear(); }
      Specified by:
      getType in interface SourceInfo
      Overrides:
      getType in class DefaultSourceInfo
      Parameters:
      expr - an expression.
      Returns:
      the type of the expression, or null if the type could not be computed.
